description: Loket provides payroll and HR software used to manage employers, employees, employments, and payroll processing. Its developer portal documents integrations for accessing and modifying Loket payroll-platform data.
summary: loket-acc.nl exposes a Loket REST API on the acceptance environment (`api.loket-acc.nl`) authenticated with OAuth2-issued Bearer tokens; no GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces were found on this domain.
